title: Three Melbourne Teenagers Arrested After Alleged Aggravated Burglary & Police Chase | 10 News
description: There has been a dramatic arrest of three teenagers taken down after an aggravated burglary and high-speed pursuit across Melbourne’s southeastern suburbs. A husband and wife barricaded themselves in a bedroom as the masked intruders ransacked their Ashwood home, before speeding off in the family's Audi. title: Australian Petrol Stations Impose Buying Restrictions As Fuel Prices Continue To Increase | 10 News
description: We're told fuel supply is stabilising, but prices certainly are not. Premium unleaded is now close to three dollars a litre at some service stations, with warnings that prices will likely rise. The Premier is considering emergency measures, if required, while some Sydney servos begin imposing buying limits. title: Australia Pushes To Use Canola To Make Own Biodiesel Amid Fuel Shortage | 10 News
description: As motorists continue to battle service station shock, the agricultural industry is asking one question: why don't we farm more fuel? Most canola grown in Australia is shipped offshore to Europe to be made into biofuel at a time the nation is desperate for its own liquid gold. title: Aussie Pub Giving Away Fuel, Kyle Sandilands Sues, Concern Over Booming Cigarette Market | 10 News+
description: Australia’s fuel crisis is hitting hard, but a country pub in Victoria is stepping up in an unexpected way. Instead of the classic meat tray raffle, locals now have the chance to win something far more valuable right now… petrol. As global tensions rise and uncertainty surrounds oil supply routes like the Strait of Hormuz, everyday Aussies are feeling the pinch at the bowser. This small-town pub is offering a unique way to help its community cope.  Australia’s stock market has taken another hit and it’s raising serious concerns about superannuation balances. The ASX has fallen again, wiping out nearly $300 billion in value since the conflict began, leaving millions of Australians worried about their financial future. So what does this mean for your super right now — and could it recover? Money expert Michael McCarthy breaks down what’s happening in the markets and what you should (and shouldn’t) do next.  With petrol prices soaring across Australia, one Queensland service station has made a bold and unexpected decision to stop selling fuel altogether. Rather than pass rising costs onto customers, the servo has reinvented itself as a welcoming local café, serving up coffee instead of petrol. It’s a surprising shift that’s turning heads and raising questions about the future of fuel in Australia.  Health experts are raising concerns over a worrying new trend, smoking is making a comeback in Australia. Driven by the rise of cheap black market tobacco and shifting social attitudes, more Australians are picking up the habit, despite decades of public health warnings. Authorities say the glamorisation of smoking online is also playing a role, especially among younger people.  10 News+ LIVE: Trusted, in-depth reporting from Australia and around the world. 👍 Like this stream to support our in-depth coverage 🔔 Subscribe and turn on notifications for breaking news alerts ↗ Share this coverage to keep others informed  📲 Stay Across Breaking News 24/7 Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/10NewsPlus/ TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@10newsplus/ Snapchat: https://www.snapchat.com/add/tennewsplus 🎧 Listen on Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/show/0tWZ6sIJTQ2WHgYdjgaAA7?si=cb30d7fd3d3541fa  📺 Watch 10 News+ 6pm Monday–Friday | 6:30pm Sunday on Network 10 Missed the bulletin? title: Two Pilots Dead In Plane-Truck Collision At Major US Airport | 10 News
